Uses of Interface
com.societegenerale.failover.core.FailoverHandler

Packages that use FailoverHandler
Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
Spring Boot auto-configuration for the failover framework.
com.societegenerale.failover.core
Central failover handler and execution abstractions.
com.societegenerale.failover.execution.resilience
Resilience4j integration for failover method execution.

  • Uses of FailoverHandler in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration

    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration that return FailoverHandler
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FailoverHandler<Object>
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.failoverHandler(KeyGenerator keyGenerator, ExpiryPolicy<Object> expiryPolicy, FailoverClock clock, FailoverStore<Object> failoverStore, PayloadEnricher<Object> payloadEnricher, RecoveredPayloadHandler recoveredPayloadHandler, CompositeObservablePublisher observablePublisher, FailoverExpiryExtractor failoverExpiryExtractor, PayloadSplitterLookup<Object,Object> payloadSplitterLookup, ContextPropagator contextPropagator, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<org.springframework.core.task.TaskExecutor> scatterGatherExecutorProvider, FailoverProperties failoverProperties)
    Assembles the full FailoverHandler decorator chain: AdvancedFailoverHandler(ScatterGatherFailoverHandler(DefaultFailoverHandler)).
    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration with parameters of type FailoverHandler
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FailoverExecution<Object>
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.failoverExecution(FailoverHandler<Object> failoverHandler, MethodExceptionHandler methodExceptionHandler)
    Registers BasicFailoverExecution, active when failover.type=basic (the default).
    FailoverExecution<Object>
    ResilienceFailoverExecutionAutoConfiguration.failoverExecution(FailoverHandler<Object> failoverHandler, MethodExceptionHandler methodExceptionHandler, io.github.resilience4j.circuitbreaker.CircuitBreakerRegistry circuitBreakerRegistry)
    Registers ResilienceFailoverExecution backed by the application's CircuitBreakerRegistry.

  • Uses of FailoverHandler in com.societegenerale.failover.core

    Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.core that implement FailoverHandler
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractFailoverHandler<T>
    Base class for FailoverHandler implementations that do not need the intercepted Method.
    class 
    AdvancedFailoverHandler<T>
    FailoverHandler decorator that publishes metrics on every store/recover operation and delegates payload post-processing to a RecoveredPayloadHandler.
    class 
    DefaultFailoverHandler<T>
    Default FailoverHandler that persists payloads to the failover store on success and retrieves them on failure, applying expiry checks and payload enrichment.
    class 
    ScatterGatherFailoverHandler<T,R>
    FailoverHandler decorator that adds scatter/gather routing to Failover-annotated methods.
    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.core with parameters of type FailoverHandler
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T, R> ScatterGatherFailoverHandler.Builder<T,R>
    ScatterGatherFailoverHandler.builder(FailoverHandler<T> delegateT, FailoverHandler<R> delegateR, PayloadSplitterLookup<T,R> payloadSplitterLookup)
    Creates a builder seeded with the three required collaborators.

  • Uses of FailoverHandler in com.societegenerale.failover.execution.resilience

    Constructors in com.societegenerale.failover.execution.resilience with parameters of type FailoverHandler
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    ResilienceFailoverExecution(FailoverHandler<T> failoverHandler, MethodExceptionHandler methodExceptionHandler, io.github.resilience4j.circuitbreaker.CircuitBreakerRegistry circuitBreakerRegistry)
    Creates a resilience-backed failover execution.
